The user wants me to identify and timestamp specific football plays from the video.
The criteria are:
- Defensive sacks or quarterback scrambles.
- Start timestamp: Snap of the ball.
- End timestamp: Quarterback tackled or slides.
- Exclude slow-motion replays unless necessary.
- Annotate: Quarterback name, primary defender, down and distance.

    - Down/Distance: 1st & 10
    - Defender: Romeo Okwara (#55)
